query:
SELECT id, cleanerName, customerName, customerPhone, jobDate, serviceDateTime, jobRevenue, basePay FROM cleaner_jobs WHERE bookingId = 999999;
SELECT id, cleanerJobId, customerPhone, customerFirstName, status, smsText FROM rating_sms_pending WHERE customerPhone = '+13029816191' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
command:
